proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving treatment_osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: ORR treatment_pembrolizumab=1 = 0.174 (n=25008) vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0 = 0.164 (n=24992); diff = +0.010; chi2 p = 0.00341
ORR treatment_sotorasib=1 = 0.169 (n=17544) vs treatment_sotorasib=0 = 0.169 (n=32456); diff = +0.001; chi2 p = 0.829
ORR treatment_olaparib=1 = 0.170 (n=14999) vs treatment_olaparib=0 = 0.169 (n=35001); diff = +0.001; chi2 p = 0.724
ORR treatment_osimertinib=1 = 0.165 (n=14976) vs treatment_osimertinib=0 = 0.170 (n=35024); diff = -0.005; chi2 p = 0.179

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher objective_response rate in patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab (positive interaction).
Among patients with pdl1_tps >= 0.5, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with higher objective_response than no treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef (log-odds) = +0.591, p = 1.57e-07; main pembro coef = -0.114; pdl1 coef = -0.137.

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by pembro within PDL1>=0.5

proposed_hypotheses.text: tmb_high modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response: pembrolizumab response rate is higher in tmb_high=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.184, p = 0.000415; in TMB-high pembro vs not: ORR pembro+/tmb=1 = 0.197 (n=7111) vs pembro-/tmb=1 = 0.167 (n=7147); diff = +0.030; chi2 p = 5.39e-06; in TMB-low: ORR pembro+/tmb=0 = 0.165 (n=17897) vs pembro-/tmb=0 = 0.163 (n=17845); diff = +0.002; chi2 p = 0.612.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with egfr_mutation=1, treatment_osimertinib is associated with higher objective_response rate than no osimertinib (matched targeted therapy).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_osimertinib and egfr_mutation on objective_response.

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by osimertinib within EGFR+

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.024, p = 0.758.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with kras_g12c=1, treatment_sotorasib is associated with higher objective_response than no sotorasib (matched targeted therapy).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_sotorasib and kras_g12c on objective_response.

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by sotorasib within KRAS_G12C+

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.059, p = 0.427.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib is associated with higher objective_response than no olaparib (matched PARP inhibitor).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on objective_response.

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by olaparib within BRCA2+

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.177, p = 0.275.

proposed_hypotheses.text: stk11_mutation modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response: pembrolizumab response is lower in stk11_mutation=1 patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.211, p = 0.00178; in STK11+ ORR pembro+/STK11+ = 0.158 (n=3727) vs pembro-/STK11+ = 0.173 (n=3724); diff = -0.015; chi2 p = 0.0835; in STK11- ORR pembro+/STK11- = 0.177 (n=21281) vs pembro-/STK11- = 0.162 (n=21268); diff = +0.014; chi2 p = 9.66e-05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: keap1_mutation modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response: pembrolizumab response is lower in keap1_mutation=1 patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.058, p = 0.363; in KEAP1+: ORR pembro+/KEAP1+ = 0.171 (n=4265) vs pembro-/KEAP1+ = 0.168 (n=4153); diff = +0.003; chi2 p = 0.727.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower objective_response (worse performance status reduces response).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: albumin_g_dl coef = +0.09067 log-odds per unit, p = 0.00014.
ldh_u_l coef = +0.00010 log-odds per unit, p = 0.505.
crp_mg_l coef = -0.00487 log-odds per unit, p = 0.000688.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: NLR coef = -0.0050 log-odds per unit, p = 0.384.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Weight loss coef = -0.0385 per pct point, p = 1.79e-32.

proposed_hypotheses.text: has_brain_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
liver_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
bone_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: ORR has_brain_mets=1 = 0.144 (n=12584) vs has_brain_mets=0 = 0.177 (n=37416); diff = -0.034; chi2 p = 1.99e-18
ORR liver_mets=1 = 0.173 (n=7546) vs liver_mets=0 = 0.168 (n=42454); diff = +0.005; chi2 p = 0.339

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with smoking_status='current' have higher objective_response than 'never' (smoking-related immunogenicity).
Within treatment_pembrolizumab patients, current/former smokers have higher objective_response than never-smokers.

analyses.code: chi-square ever vs never smoker within pembro+
analyses.result_summary: ORR pembro+ ever-smoker = 0.176 (n=21268) vs pembro+ never-smoker = 0.164 (n=3740); diff = +0.011; chi2 p = 0.104

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with histology='squamous' differ in objective_response rate compared to 'adenocarcinoma'.
sex_female modifies the effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.
sex_female has a main effect on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.146, p = 0.00237.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Age coef = +0.0005 per year, p = 0.668.

proposed_hypotheses.text: tp53_mutation=1 is associated with lower objective_response.

None of the surveyed SNPs (snp_rs1045642, snp_rs1065852, snp_rs1799853, snp_rs1800566, snp_rs2228001, snp_rs1801133, snp_rs429358, snp_rs7412, snp_rs662) are associated with objective_response after considering multiple comparisons.

analyses.code: per-SNP logit(orr ~ snp); count nominal and Bonferroni-significant
analyses.result_summary: Tested 23 SNPs; 2 nominally significant (p<0.05); min p = 0.0182; Bonferroni threshold 0.00217; 0 significant after correction. Nominal hits: [('snp_rs7412', np.float64(0.10034465740610124), np.float64(0.018221867564151072)), ('snp_rs1050828', np.float64(-0.09891305147992743), np.float64(0.031161645084818054))].

proposed_hypotheses.text: objective_response rate differs by race_ethnicity category.
objective_response rate differs by insurance_type.
rural_residence=1 is associated with different objective_response than rural_residence=0.

analyses.result_summary: ORR by insurance: {'mean': {'medicaid': 0.16130875839405628, 'medicare': 0.16847672112569648, 'private': 0.17202239822428492, 'uninsured': 0.17}, 'count': {'medicaid': 6999, 'medicare': 21178, 'private': 19823, 'uninsured': 2000}}; chi2 p = 0.232; private minus uninsured = +0.002.

proposed_hypotheses.text: alk_fusion=1 is associated with lower objective_response in pembrolizumab-treated patients (ALK-rearranged NSCLC tends to be less responsive to PD-1 blockade).

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by alk_fusion within pembro+
analyses.result_summary: ORR pembro+/ALK+ = 0.169 (n=1186) vs pembro+/ALK- = 0.174 (n=23822); diff = -0.005; chi2 p = 0.712

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable logistic regression including treatments, biomarkers, ECOG PS, albumin, NLR, brain/liver mets, age, and PDL1, the matched-targeted-therapy interactions (osimertinib×egfr, sotorasib×kras_g12c, olaparib×brca2) and pembrolizumab×pdl1_tps remain positively and significantly associated with objective_response.

analyses.code: multivariable logit with treatment×biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted multivariable: treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps: +0.5936 (p=1.74e-07); treatment_pembrolizumab:tmb_high: +0.1764 (p=0.000778); treatment_pembrolizumab:stk11_mutation: -0.2048 (p=0.00264); treatment_pembrolizumab:keap1_mutation: -0.0540 (p=0.401); treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation: +0.0195 (p=0.804); treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c: +0.0665 (p=0.377); treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation: -0.1797 (p=0.272); ecog_ps: -0.3796 (p=5.62e-95); albumin_g_dl: +0.0919 (p=0.000132); crp_mg_l: -0.0051 (p=0.0004); nlr: -0.0053 (p=0.362); ldh_u_l: +0.0001 (p=0.5); weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.0391 (p=4.45e-33); has_brain_mets: -0.2577 (p=6.36e-19); liver_mets: +0.0341 (p=0.307); age_years: +0.0005 (p=0.686)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with markedly higher objective_response than no pembrolizumab (combined biomarker enrichment).

analyses.code: chi-square ORR by pembro within PDL1>=0.5 & TMB-high
analyses.result_summary: ORR pembro+/PDL1>=0.5+TMBhi = 0.294 (n=1590) vs pembro-/PDL1>=0.5+TMBhi = 0.155 (n=1560); diff = +0.139; chi2 p = 1.88e-20

proposed_hypotheses.text: stage_iv=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.

In a final adjusted model, treatment_pembrolizumab interacts negatively with stk11_mutation AND with keap1_mutation, and positively with pdl1_tps; these interactions remain significant after adjustment for prognostic covariates.

analyses.result_summary: ORR stage IV = 0.154 (n=32365) vs not stage IV = 0.196 (n=17635); diff = -0.042; chi2 p = 1.11e-33
fatigue coef = -0.0222, p = 0.0402.

analyses.code: adjusted multivariable interaction estimates from iteration 23
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted: pembro×STK11 = -0.205 (p=0.00264); pembro×KEAP1 = -0.054 (p=0.401); pembro×PDL1 = +0.594 (p=1.74e-07).
